title: Allowing conversation updates to update "Last Updated" column.
excerpt: Currently, if a person adds an update in the conversation of an item, it does not update the “Last Updated” column. This seems like an error instead of an intended function. If it’s intended, could there be a toggle adde…

posts.author: JCDMI (James Ceart)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, if a person adds an update in the conversation of an item, it does not update the “Last Updated” column. This seems like an error instead of an intended function. If it’s intended, could there be a toggle added to the “Last Updated” column to account for updates in the conversation of an item?

posts.author: MAndrus (Melissa)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the ability to surface the most recent comment at the board level on items as part of the last updated column or creating a new column ‘Most recent comment/update’ would not go amiss.

posts.author: dsmolinski (Denny Smolinski)
posts.cookedHtml: Or have another column that is called “Last Updated Conversation”

posts.author: julief (Julie F)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! monday.com we need this. Also please make sure it includes any updates to the subitem conversations. Voted! I am doing workarounds per suggestions in the knowledge community, but currently none of the workarounds work for conversation updates on subitems.
